name: Pacific Lime And Cement Limited
analysis: PLA's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.3750, stop A$0.3366, target A$0.4902 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
